subcodes.first_line: The Lord of the worlds hath borne witness unto His own Self, made manifest through the Most Great Name, that verily He is I and I am He, and He is the Ruler [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد مولی العالم لنفسه الظاهره بالاسم الاعظم انه هو انا و انا هو و هو الحاکم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
